title: Webinar: Make monday.com MAKE SENSE for Retail

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Join polishedgeek on January 21 to learn how to design monday.com workflows so retail teams can communicate clearly, execute efficiently, and measure what really matters for your organization.

What you’ll learn:

  • Why monday.com needs structure, not more boards
  • The 4 core issues creating chaos for retail for retail teams
  • How poor workflows kill visibility across inventory, orders, and projects
  • What ‘good’ actually looks like inside monday.com

Who should attend:
Retail and manufacturing teams, including project managers, operations leaders, and team leads, whether they currently use monday.com or other work management tools, or have outgrown spreadsheets but aren’t ready for an ERP.

Attend and receive geeky goodies made for retail teams!

Register here: https://utm.io/mdcc-mcc-jan-2026

Speakers:
Liz Perry, MSOD | Senior Process Consultant
Michael Harrison| Senior Process Consultant

See you there!
